title: Positive flow - successful registration
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name: John Doe | Email Address: john.doe@example.com | Password: Password1234
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'Full Name' field | Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the 'Email Address' field | Enter 'Password1234' in the 'Password' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
expected_result: The user is redirected to the home screen with a success message

title: Negative flow - empty fields
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
expected_result: The user is presented with error messages for all fields

title: Negative flow - invalid email
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name: John Doe | Email Address: john.doe@example | Password: Password1234
test_steps: Enter 'john.doe@example' in the 'Email Address' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message for the 'Email Address' field

title: Negative flow - password too short
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name: John Doe | Email Address: john.doe@example.com | Password: Pass123
test_steps: Enter 'Pass123' in the 'Password' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message for the 'Password' field

title: Negative flow - password toggle
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name: John Doe | Email Address: john.doe@example.com | Password: Password1234
test_steps: Click the 'Show' toggle next to the 'Password' field | Enter 'Password1234' in the 'Password' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message for the 'Password' field

title: Negative flow - empty 'Full Name' field
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name:  | Email Address: john.doe@example.com | Password: Password1234
test_steps: Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the 'Email Address' field | Enter 'Password1234' in the 'Password' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message for the 'Full Name' field

title: Negative flow - empty 'Email Address' field
preconditions: The user is on the registration screen
test_data: Full Name: John Doe | Email Address:  | Password: Password1234
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'Full Name' field | Enter 'Password1234' in the 'Password' field | Click the 'SUBMIT' button
